name: Lob API
what_it_does: Lob API — programmatic direct mail and address verification — send postcards, letters, and checks via physical mail, and validate US/international addresses from agent workflows.
use_cases: Agents sending physical postcards or letters as part of customer outreach campaigns
Mailing verification codes or documents that require physical delivery (legal notices, checks)
Address standardization and validation before storing or using addresses in agent pipelines
Printing and mailing invoices, statements, or reports generated by agents
CASS-certified address verification for USPS deliverability checking in real time
not_for: Digital messaging — Lob is for physical mail only; use email/SMS for digital
International mail at scale — Lob's address verification is strongest for US addresses
High-frequency real-time triggering — physical mail has 2-5 day delivery lead times
best_when: Agent workflows need to trigger physical mail delivery programmatically — postcards, letters, or checks — with real-time USPS address validation.
avoid_when: You need digital communication or near-real-time notification — physical mail has inherent delivery lag.

auth.notes: API Key via HTTP Basic Auth (key as username, empty password). Test and live API keys separate — use test key to preview without incurring costs.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Test mode is free; address verification: 300 free lookups/month
pricing.paid_tiers: Postcards from $0.79 each; letters from $0.79; address verification $0.003/request
pricing.notes: Test API key allows full API exploration without sending real mail. Production use requires payment method. Volume discounts for enterprise.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Clear REST errors with error code and message. Address validation returns deliverability codes (deliverable, deliverable_incorrect_unit, undeliverable) that agents can act on. Well-structured error objects.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: No idempotency keys — retrying a send creates duplicate mail. Use metadata and external tracking to detect retries before calling send.
known_agent_gotchas: Test mode API calls look identical to live — easy to accidentally switch to live key and incur real costs and mail
Mail pieces cannot be cancelled once sent to print (usually within seconds of API call)
Custom HTML templates must pass Lob's HTML/CSS validation which is stricter than browser rendering
Delivery tracking via webhooks — pieces don't appear in USPS tracking immediately after API call
International mail support is limited — verify country coverage before relying on for global workflows

security_score_components.security_notes: API keys are test/live separated — strong pattern for preventing accidental production sends. TLS enforced. SOC2 Type II certified. CCPA compliant.
